productName: Stingers - 5pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - Jesse's Girl - 2.5g
description: A indica infused joint built on Jessie's Girl and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — earthy, sweet undertones, with deep, easygoing relaxation. A little goes a long way.
